---
title: 'Reason vs Pro Tools'
date: '2013-10-12T16:29:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Towdah: tō·dä'''
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2441467581619693920'
blogger_filename: '/2013/10/reason-vs-pro-tools.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Towdah_ tō·dä_/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Software'
---

Reason 7<br />
<a href="http://www.propellerheads.se/download/">http://www.propellerheads.se/download/</a><br />
Avid Pro Tools 11<br />
<a href="http://www.avid.com/Trial/ProTools/Activate">http://www.avid.com/Trial/ProTools/Activate</a><br />
<a href="http://www.avid.com/Trial/ProTools/Download">http://www.avid.com/Trial/ProTools/Download</a><br />
iLok.com<br />
<a href="https://www.ilok.com/">https://www.ilok.com/</a>
